code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if not string.is_empty(cur)
          match string.parse_int(cur)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          cur = ""
        end
      else
        cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(cur)
    match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn intersect_unique(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut uniq: List<Int> = []
  for x in a
    if list.contains(b, x) and not list.contains(uniq, x)
      uniq = list.push(uniq, x)
    end
  end
  uniq
end

fn sort_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  let n = xs.len()
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut placed = 0
  mut prev = 0
  mut have_prev = false
  while placed < n
    mut found = false
    mut candidate = 0
    for v in xs
      if have_prev
        if v > prev
          if not found
            candidate = v
            found = true
          else if v < candidate
            candidate = v
          end
        end
      else
        if not found
          candidate = v
          found = true
        else if v < candidate
          candidate = v
        end
      end
    end
    sorted = list.push(sorted, candidate)
    prev = candidate
    have_prev = true
    placed = placed + 1
  end
  sorted
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)
let inter = intersect_unique(a, b)
let sorted = sort_list(inter)

if sorted.len() == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for v in sorted
    if first
      out = "#{v}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
